args:
set -e
omk_bin="$(command -v omk 2>/dev/null || command -v oh-my-kimi 2>/dev/null || true)"
if [ -n "$omk_bin" ]; then
  omk_cli="$('/usr/bin/node' -e 'const fs=require('\''fs'\'');process.stdout.write(fs.realpathSync(process.argv[1]))' "$omk_bin" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if [ -n "$omk_cli" ]; then
    exec '/usr/bin/node' "$omk_cli" mcp serve omk-project
  fi
fi
mcp_bin="$(command -v omk-project-mcp 2>/dev/null || true)"
if [ -n "$mcp_bin" ]; then
  mcp_js="$('/usr/bin/node' -e 'const fs=require('\''fs'\'');process.stdout.write(fs.realpathSync(process.argv[1]))' "$mcp_bin" 2>/dev/null || true)"
  if [ -n "$mcp_js" ]; then
    exec '/usr/bin/node' "$mcp_js"
  fi
fi
echo "omk-project MCP server not found; install @oh-my-kimi/cli or rerun omk init" >&2
exit 127
